page.subtitle: Markdown discovered under specs/, docs/, or insights/ folders that reviewers can be pointed at.
page.docCount: {count, plural, one {# document discovered} other {# documents discovered}}
page.loadError: Could not load project context documents.

noRepo.title: No repo selected
noRepo.body: Add or select a repo to browse its project context documents.

empty.title: No project context documents found
empty.body: Add markdown under a specs/, docs/, or insights/ folder anywhere in the repo and it will show up here.

row.usedBy: {count, plural, one {Used by # agent} other {Used by # agents}}

list.warningLine: Large context set — roughly {count} tokens will be added to every review prompt.
